compiled_state.title: Write structural boundary tests for Manual Story Tag Guard in implementation-plan SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation Notes

This task writes structural boundary tests for the Manual Story Tag Guard section that Story 312b-9e42 adds to plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md. Per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5, SKILL.md is a non-executable LLM instruction file — tests must target the structural boundary only (section headings, referential integrity, schema compliance).

Test file: tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh

The test file must assert (before the SKILL.md change is made) that these structural boundary conditions DO NOT yet exist — they fail RED — and after SKILL.md is updated in Task T3 they pass GREEN.

Tests to write:
1. test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present — Given: SKILL.md updated with guard; When: grep for "^## Manual Story Tag Guard"; Then: exits 0 (section heading is the navigable interface)
2. test_external_dependencies_block_contract_referenced — Given: SKILL.md guard section; When: grep for "external-dependencies-block.md"; Then: exits 0 (referential integrity — guard must reference the contract schema)
3. test_flag_gate_referenced — Given: SKILL.md guard section; When: grep for "planning.external_dependency_block_enabled"; Then: exits 0 (flag gate reference is the structural contract)
4. test_refusal_diagnostic_structure_present — Given: SKILL.md guard section; When: grep for "STATUS:blocked" in context of manual guard; Then: exits 0 (the refusal output shape is the structural contract)
5. test_manual_step_exclusion_marker_present — Given: SKILL.md guard section; When: grep for "manual verification step" or equivalent exclusion language; Then: exits 0 (the exclusion instruction is the structural boundary per story DD4)

All tests source tests/lib/assert.sh and follow the Given/When/Then format.

Also update .test-index: add tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh to the plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md entry with RED markers for the five test functions above.

## TDD Requirement
Write test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present, which asserts grep -q "^## Manual Story Tag Guard" "$SKILL_FILE" succeeds. This test FAILS (RED) before Task T3 adds the section, because no such heading exists in SKILL.md today.

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: implementation-plan/SKILL.md at its current state (no Manual Story Tag Guard section)
- When: the test file is created and run
- Then: test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present exits FAIL (RED)

## Acceptance Criteria

Universal:
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes for all pre-existing tests (exit 0; new test file excluded until T3 completes)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5

Task-specific:
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 5 test functions following Given/When/Then format
  Verify: grep -c "^echo.*---" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present FAILS when run against current SKILL.md (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL.*manual_tag_guard_section_heading"
- [ ] .test-index updated: tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh added to SKILL.md entry with [test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present] RED marker
  Verify: grep -q "test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh \[test_manual_tag_guard_section_heading_present\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0) — no Python files modified
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
